posts.text:
Yup.  All 20.


Erick Erickson (@EWErickson)

All 20 for me.



— https://nitter.net/EWErickson/status/2033712241816588339#m

I’ve been leading the fight against the Islamization of Texas and the nation for years. Radical groups like CAIR are protesting me and my office after I filed legislation to strip their tax exempt status.

As Attorney General, I will use the full power of the office to dismantle these networks.

Video

“The Austin Police Association is proud to endorse Chip Roy for Texas Attorney General. In a city like Austin, it is rare to have elected officials who are not only supportive of law enforcement, but vocal and unwavering in that support. Chip Roy has been a relentless advocate for public safety and the rule of law. 

As Austin’s Congressman, Chip Roy has consistently stood on principle and the US constitution - defending law enforcement officers and rejecting policies that undermine accountabili

Pass the PAUSE Act 

Terrorist attacks fuel GOP push to crack down on legal immigration washingtonexaminer.com/polic… via @dcexaminer
Proud to receive the highest score of any Texas Legislator in line with the GOP Platform and A1 Agenda #LiveFree

Praying for you, Susie - will be ready to welcome you to the “We beat cancer” club.  Godspeed.


Rapid Response 47 (@RapidResponse47)







— https://nitter.net/RapidResponse47/status/2033573681973133389#m

I introduced the PAUSE Act to freeze immigration until we reassert our sovereignty

Too many people are entering this country who refuse to assimilate, disregard our laws, and undermine the principles that make America strong

Video

Correct and thank you!  The Attorney General’s job is too important to be bought by Trust Fund Mayes and require on-the-job training.  #TexasIsNotForSale


Texas Bluebonnet 👶🦅🤠 (@TexasBluebonne6)

We need an AG that’s actually been in a courtroom. I’m voting for @chiproytx



— https://nitter.net/TexasBluebonne6/status/2033576561547399383#m

But I know Texans can't be bought.  Texans deserve an AG with real legal experience, conservative bonafides, and the grit to fight even when it's hard. 

Chip in today to prove Texas isn't for sale.  secure.anedot.com/texans-for…
Now David Mayes Middleton II is using the silver spoon he was born with to shovel a crapload of BS onto your TV screens so he can buy the office of Attorney General.

Family money is why David Mayes has a cushy board of directors seat at a bank.

Family money is what enabled David Mayes to get himself out of legal trouble, as the only time he was in a courtroom is was when he was sued for crashing into a woman while distractedly driving his Ferrari.

Family money is what enabled David Mayes Middleton II to party it up in Austin, taking 6 years to get a 4-year finance degree. 

Family money is what enabled David Mayes to go to law school and never work in a courtroom or practice law.
David Mayes talks about being a "businessman," but the reality is, he was born with a trust fund, comfortably living off oil royalties from land his ancestors secured nearly 100 years ago.

Where does his money come from anyway?

David Mayes Middleton II says his "business" experience is what qualifies him to run the 4,000-employee attorney general's office.

But even his inherited "oil company" has just a handful of employees.
The truth is, I wouldn't hire Mayes for an entry level position in the AG's office - he has no qualifications for it. Texas shouldn't let him buy the leading role in it.

My opponent, David Mayes Middleton II is funding his campaign almost entirely by himself. He has spent at least $14 million of his own money trying to buy this race. Why?

Because David Mayes has no real legal experience and simply wants to climb to higher office.

In just over 6 months, I have received incredible grassroots financial support from Texans in this campaign for Attorney General. 

We've raised more than double what my opponent has, because Texans understand I'm the only conservative with real legal experience in this race.

Honored to hold an A+ rating over four terms in Congress with NumbersUSA. 

We’ve work side by side to fight for border security and American interests when the swamp pushes for cheap labor 

More to do. @NumbersUSA
